title: PMS Multicolor Plastic My First Shapes & Letters Set - 1 Complete Set - Perfect for Early Learning and Development
seller_info_text: Mrtoybox Ltd (We supply official Uk goods)
features: VIBRANT & ENGAGING DESIGN: Each set includes a colorful sorting bucket and 16 eye-catching shapes & numbers, providing a visually stimulating and engaging play experience for children aged 2+ years.
DURABLE & SAFE MATERIAL: Made of high-quality, -toxic plastic, our "My First Shapes & Letters Set" is built to withstand countless hours of play while ensuring absolute safety for your little ones.

EDUCATIONAL AND FUN: Our multicolor plastic "My First Shapes & Letters Set" is the perfect early learning toy, designed to promote cognitive development, fine motor skills, and shape & number recognition in young children.

GREAT VALUE & ENDLESS FUN: With 1 complete set, your child can explore different combinations, learn the basic shapes & numbers, and enjoy countless possibilities for creative fun and cognitive development.

PERFECT GIFT FOR YOUNG LEARNERS: Surprise your child, grandchild, niece, or nephew with this versatile early learning set - it's an ideal gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because you love them! Boost your child's learning journey with this affordable and engaging educational toy.
description: Introducing the multicolor plastic "My First Shapes & Letters Set" - the perfect toolkit to kickstart your child's journey of early learning and development. This complete set includes vibrantly colored shapes and letters designed to engage and stimulate your child's curiosity. Each piece is made from durable, child-safe plastic, ensuring longevity and safety. The set offers a hands-on way for your child to familiarize themselves with basic shapes and the alphabet, promoting their cognitive development, fine motor skills, and letter recognition. Engage, educate, and entertain with the multicolor plastic "My First Shapes & Letters Set", the ideal choice for your little one's early learning.
